accountId.title: accountId
accountId.description: The Salesforce ID of the account to find similar accounts for

matchCriteria.title: matchCriteria
matchCriteria.description: REQUIRED. Must be one of: 'industry', 'type', or 'both'. Extract from user message: if user mentions industry, use 'industry'. If user mentions type, use 'type'. Otherwise use 'both'.
